name: Caerleon Roman Amphitheatre & Usk
highlights: The most impressive Roman amphitheatre in Britain plus riverside walk.
points_of_interest: Caerleon Roman Fort (Isca Augusta); Roman amphitheatre; National Roman Legion Museum; Roman Baths
parking_start: Caerleon town car park (Broadway) or Museum parking
food_drink_nearby: The Priory Hotel; Bell Inn Caerleon; The Hanbury Arms (Tennyson's inspiration); Caerleon Old Bakery
hazards_notes: Popular with school trips; museum free
